Headline: Healthy gums support a healthy smile
Supporting Text: Brush gently twice daily and clean between your teeth.
Notes: Use a calm educational tone; avoid fear-based language.

Headline: Do not ignore tooth sensitivity
Supporting Text: Sensitivity can have several causes. A dental examination can help identify the reason.
Notes: Do not diagnose or promise a treatment result.

Headline: Make bedtime brushing non-negotiable
Supporting Text: Night-time brushing helps remove the day's plaque and food debris.
Notes: Keep the copy family-friendly and concise.
